title: Ask AI about me
subtitle: Powered by Qwen2.5 in your browser
welcome: Hi! I'm an AI assistant that can answer questions about Hoang Dung — experience, skills, projects, and more. What would you like to know?

loader.title: Loading AI model
loader.subtitle: First time only — the model is cached afterwards (~150MB).

errors.load: Couldn't load the AI model. Your browser may not support it, or the network failed. Please try again.
errors.generate: Sorry, I ran into an error generating a response. Please try again.

fallback: I don't have that information. Please contact directly via email: {{email}}.

contactFlow.offer: Would you like to send a message to Hoang Dung?
contactFlow.askMessage: Got it. What message would you like to send?
contactFlow.success: Sent successfully! Hoang Dung will reply within 24h.
contactFlow.error: Sorry, sending failed. Please email directly: {{email}}.
contactFlow.cancelled: No problem — let me know if you change your mind.
contactFlow.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email. Could you re-enter it?

disclaimer: AI responses are generated locally and may be imperfect.
